condition.description: Defines the IAM condition for the member's role binding, specifying when and how the binding is applied. Must include title, expression, and description.

instance.description: Specifies the Spanner instance to which the IAM policy member will be applied; must already exist.

member.description: Specifies the identity to which the IAM role will be applied, such as a user, group, or service account.

role.description: Defines the IAM role to be assigned to the member for the Spanner instance (e.g., roles/spanner.databaseAdmin).
